nodes.name: settings.json
nodes.summary: Claude Code project settings defining the tool permission allowlist for this repository.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent-facing contract doc for the adapters package, describing the IMAP and Ollama HTTP client subpackages, ownership, and verification rules.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent-facing contract doc for the contacts package covering purpose, ownership, local contracts, and verification guidance.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent-facing contract doc for the mailcache package describing local contracts, ownership boundaries, and how to verify changes.

nodes.name: Desktop_Pairing.md
nodes.summary: Detailed implementation guide for the desktop notification pairing feature, covering the pairing API endpoint, storage/retrieve/delete flows, and usage examples.

nodes.name: 2026-07-10-apn-relay-deployment-design.md
nodes.summary: Design and deployment spec for the APNs relay Cloudflare Worker, covering architecture, Apple credential setup, wrangler configuration, and validation steps.

nodes.name: 2026-07-12-contact-dedupe-design.md
nodes.summary: Design spec for server-side contact deduplication and merge, defining the matching detail, merge policy, data model changes, and response shape.

nodes.name: llamalabels.xcf
nodes.summary: GIMP source image (XCF) for the Llama Mail branding artwork used to produce app icons.

nodes.name: manifest.webmanifest
nodes.summary: PWA web app manifest declaring the Llama Mail app name, standalone display mode, theme colors, and icon set.

nodes.name: sw.js
nodes.summary: Service worker handling Web Push: refreshes VAPID subscriptions on pushsubscriptionchange, renders push notifications, and focuses/opens the target URL on notification click.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the Push API and Notification API within service-worker lifecycle events (push, pushsubscriptionchange, notificationclick).

nodes.name: agpl-3.0.txt
nodes.summary: Full text of the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 bundled with the frontend for license display.

nodes.name: styles.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet for the frontend, providing the complete visual design system (layout, theming, components) for the Llama Mail web client.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declaration referencing Vite client types for the frontend build.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration enabling the React plugin and setting the dev server port for the frontend.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent-facing contract doc for the share directory outlining its purpose, ownership, and verification guidance.

nodes.name: supervisord.conf
nodes.summary: Supervisord process configuration for the container, orchestrating bootstrap, API server, background daemon, Ollama, and model-pull programs with logging and restart policies.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines multiple [program:*] blocks with priorities to sequence startup of the API, daemon, and Ollama processes inside one container.

nodes.name: wrangler.toml.example
nodes.summary: Template wrangler configuration for the APNs relay Cloudflare Worker, documenting KV namespace bindings and required secrets.

nodes.name: wrangler.toml.example
nodes.summary: Template wrangler configuration for the Web Push relay Cloudflare Worker, documenting KV namespace bindings and required VAPID secrets.
